# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 0.2.x   | ✓         |
| < 0.2   | ✗         |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not file a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Email **uzbekswe@gmail.com** with:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact

You will receive a response within 48 hours. After a fix is released, the vulnerability will be publicly disclosed with credit to the reporter.
